title: Yosys could not  make use of the read_en signal

features.name: else_if_control_flow_with_ram_read
features.description: Code should include an else-if branch where read_en controls RAM read operation in a clocked always block
features.snippet:
always @(posedge clk) begin
	if (write_en) begin
		ram[write_address] <= write_data_in;
	end
	else if (read_en) begin
		read_data_out <= ram[read_address];
	end
end

features.name: unpacked_array_ram_declaration
features.description: Code should include a reg array declaration for RAM storage with parameterizable width and depth

features.name: dual_port_ram_with_separate_read_enable
features.description: Code should include a dual-port RAM where write and read operations are controlled by separate enable signals in an if-else structure
